enforced: v2 schema required: top-level version: "2" (golangci-lint v2 rejects v1-schema files)
linters.default: standard plus explicit enable list (govet, staticcheck, errcheck, ineffassign, unused, gocritic, revive) are machine-enforced
formatters is a separate top-level section in v2 (gofmt, goimports) — formatting is no longer configured under linters
